issue_title: Handle empty list safely in parse_items
issue_text: The parser assumes items[0] exists. When parse_items([]) is called, it crashes. Return an empty list for empty input.
success_criteria: The empty-input test passes and all target parser tests succeed.

metadata.notes: 用于 Phase 4 批量运行演示的第二条开发任务，复用相同 benchmark repo。
